summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open PR inventory items. No GitHub mutations are planned because close/comment/label are blocked, no PR has complete merge preflight evidence, and several items have failing checks or unresolved review/preflight blockers. No executable fix artifact is safe from the provided artifacts because the only plausible repair target lacks CI failure logs and resolved review-bot details.
